rateSection.heading: Send More, Save More
rateSection.description: Check live rates and see how much your loved ones will get. Every transfer with Prune is simple, fast, and rewarding.

cards.title: Zero Fees, Full Value
cards.description: Say goodbye to unnecessary charges. No hidden fees. What you send is what they get.

cards.title: Instant Transfers
cards.description: Money arrives within minutes, not days. Whether it's school fees, bills, or emergencies, Prune delivers fast.

cards.title: Cheaper Rates You Can Trust
cards.description: Maximize the value of every pound, dollar, or euro you send. We guarantee competitive exchange rates so your family gets more.
